name: Ren Ci Hospital
description: Ren Ci provides a comprehensive range of services, including palliative care, aimed at supporting frail seniors who wish to age in place. Their approach emphasizes holistic and compassionate care, ensuring that elderly individuals receive the medical and emotional support they need.

name: PeaceHealth
description: PeaceHealth offers specialized Palliative Care that focuses on relieving symptoms and reducing stress for individuals with serious illnesses. Their dedicated team collaborates with other healthcare providers to enhance the quality of life for both patients and their families, making this care available at any age and stage of illness.

name: Center to Advance Palliative Care (CAPC)
description: The Center to Advance Palliative Care (CAPC) has been instrumental in developing high-quality palliative care programs and standardizing best practices for over two decades. They provide resources, training, and support to healthcare organizations, ensuring that clinicians treating serious illnesses are equipped with essential palliative care knowledge and skills.

name: Amedisys
description: Amedisys is a trusted provider of palliative care at home, offering relief from the symptoms, side effects, and stress of serious illnesses. Their comprehensive approach ensures that each patient receives individualized care tailored to their specific needs.

name: Elara Caring
description: Elara Caring specializes in in-home palliative care, offering personalized support to help patients manage symptoms and improve their quality of life. With a comprehensive platform of care and a dedicated workforce, the company is committed to providing high-quality, compassionate care throughout patients' health journeys.

name: Personal Touch Home Care
description: Personal-Touch Home Care specializes in palliative care, offering comprehensive services that include hospice and specialized programs for continuous monitoring of patients' physical and mental health needs. With a team of licensed clinicians available 24/7, the company ensures personalized care in compliance with state regulations and accreditation standards.

name: Holy Cross Health Fl
description: Holy Cross Health offers palliative care, which focuses on enhancing the quality of life for patients and their families, optimizing function, and providing support throughout the illness. This comprehensive approach is integrated with curative treatment, regardless of prognosis or life expectancy.

name: Care Finder India
description: Care Finder® is dedicated to supporting families by connecting them with trusted service providers who specialize in senior citizen care. Their mission includes building a comprehensive marketplace that addresses specific needs, making it easier for families to find personalized support for their aging loved ones.

name: Bayshore HealthCare
description: Bayshore HealthCare offers specialized palliative care programs aimed at reducing suffering and enhancing the quality of life for patients and their families. Their services include symptom and medication management, personal care, rehabilitation, nursing care, and comprehensive end-of-life support.

name: Mercy
description: Mercy provides palliative care services that emphasize alleviating symptoms, pain, and stress associated with serious illnesses. Their approach focuses on treating the whole person, ensuring comprehensive support for patients.
